title: Inad (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Inad''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] in the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Alliance Fleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

After the discovery of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] project and, in order to learn more about it, [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] managed to sabotage and disable a [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] that was carrying [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officers assigned to the Death Star as it traveled through the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]].

The Alliance sent the ''Inad'', along with the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] [[Hunter (Lambda-class)|''Hunter'']], to [[Battle of the Corellian system|capture]] the disabled transport. The operation was protected by three [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] from [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]] and three [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]], flown by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], [[Namrhe]] and [[Omin-Oreh]].

Soon after the mission began, several [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] arrived. The Rebel fighters moved to intercept at the cost of all three X-wings. The ''Hunter'' boarded the transport and captured the officers. However while both vessels were returning to the ''Inad'', the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Immortal/Legends|Immortal]]'' arrived and began to launch [[TIE series/Legends|fighters]]. An Imperial transport also jumped out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] and attempted to recapture the fleeing transport. Farlander destroyed the attacking transport, and two more which arrived shortly afterwards. However, both his wingmen were shot down while attempting to keep the Imperial fighters off his tail.

As soon as both ships had boarded the ''Inad'', the Rebels withdrew to hyperspace.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
